content.en:
"Gone!"

Ye Tian left from the Lost Domain.

This treasure land is no longer of much use to him, even if he collects resources, it will only collect some ordinary resources, and there is no need for that.

Of course, after a long time, something will still be born here.

Treasure land has such benefits, and it can continue to breed good things.

......

After going back.

Ye Tian continued to refine those low-quality third-order supreme rule items, thereby improving his third-order supreme realm to the realm of dao-rule.

Of course, he also exchanged many resources for Eternal Solstice Gold Coins, and then exchanged them for Agar Essence to Dao Gold Liquid.

He was about to exchange a large amount of Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid, and he didn't believe that he couldn't quickly improve his cultivation.

However, just when Ye Tian had scraped together billions of Eternal Essence Gold Coins, and exchanged dozens of drops of Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid in his last breath, he was told that the Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid was not enough.

"Deacon Ye, there are only thirteen drops of Qiong Essence Dao Golden Liquid left in the Supreme Heavenly Palace!" the staff of the Supreme Heavenly Temple said apologetically.

"Why is there so little left?"

Ye Tian frowned and asked.

The staff explained: "The elixir to the Dao gold liquid of the Supreme Heavenly Temple are all extracted by the patriarchs, and the patriarchs are so existing that they don't look down on the value of this thing, so they just took a little time to extract some of them, put them in the Supreme Heavenly Palace, and didn't care about them anymore." Now, the elixir to Dao gold liquid is about to be sold out, we can't ask the elders to replenish it, right?"

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately felt that it made sense.

"The remaining thirteen drops of elixir to Dao gold liquid, I want them all!"

Ye Tian paid 1.3 billion eternal gold coins in one go.

Soon after, the Qiong Jelly to Dao Golden Liquid was sent by the Legendary Dao Realm puppet of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

In addition, Ye Tian also bought some good things that were inferior to the Agar Essence Dao Gold Liquid, which could quickly improve his cultivation, but the effect was just worse.

With so many resources, it was enough to quickly raise his cultivation to the middle stage of the Ninth Rank Dao Realm.

In the years that followed, he refined drop after drop of elixir to Dao gold liquid to improve his cultivation.

As the years passed, his cultivation also improved steadily and rapidly.

10,000 years after the Dao Era.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke the shackles and was promoted to the middle stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

Moreover, his Third Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm had also been raised from the One-Point Realm to the One-to-One Realm, but he had also consumed those Third Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items in his hand.

It can be said that his strength is much stronger now than in the past.

this day.

Ye Tian received an invitation from the Ancient Emperor of Longyan.

......

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian came to a palace, where he saw the Ancient Emperor of Longyan, and also saw a familiar figure - the Immortal Emperor.

In the past, the Immortal Emperor was an untouchable existence for him, and he could kill him countless times in an instant.

In the final period of the Tribulation, the Immortal Emperor single-handedly deterred countless Supreme Dao Void Demons, how domineering this was.

But now, his strength has surpassed that of the Immortal Emperor, and when he looks at the Immortal Emperor, he feels that this is it.

"I've seen the Ancient Emperor of Longyan. "

"I've seen the Immortal Emperor!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"Deacon Ye is polite!" Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng responded with a smile.

After Ye Tian sat down, soon another Ninefold Dao Realm came, it was a very unfamiliar Ninefold Dao Realm, he hadn't seen it, so he didn't know it.

It didn't take long.

A total of six Ninefold Dao Realms came here.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan said to Ye Tiandao: "Ye Tian, among these five, you probably know the Immortal Emperor, and the others, let me introduce to you, this is the Ninefold Dao Realm Qin Tianjian from the Qin Clan, this is the Ninefold Dao Realm Gu Jiushan from the Gu Clan, this is the Ninefold Dao Realm Long Xinghe from the Dragon Clan, and this is Kun Mingyu from the Kun Clan, they are all the same as you, taking the path of the strongest Dao. "

The strength of the Ninefold Dao Realm, which takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, is naturally no less than that of the ordinary Legendary Dao Realm.

And the Ancient Emperor of Longyan also introduced Ye Tian to them.

After getting to know each other a little, the Longyan Ancient Emperor began to get down to business.

"Except for Ye Tian, all five of you should all know what is going on, but I will continue to repeat it. "

"There are three Ninefold Dao Realm Fallen in the Legendary Realm, and the barrier has been loosened recently, so it's the easiest time to enter, so let you in. "

Longyan Ancient Emperor Road.

"Legends, what is this place?"

Ye Tian was curious.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan introduced: "The Legendary Realm is a special treasure land, where many demons of the Ninefold Dao Realm are located, the supreme bloodline of the Dao Void Demon, and the supreme strength of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to the Dao Realm, all of them are there to obtain the blood of legends and the third sequence of Dao rule items. "

Blood of Legends?

Ye Tian was even more puzzled.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan introduced: "The blood of legends is the essence blood obtained from the bodies of legendary creatures, and it is necessary to condense the body of legends. You may think that the ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that comprehends the Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao rules can break through to become a Legendary Dao Realm, right? But it's not that simple, you must use the blood of legends, condense the body of legends, and the Supreme Dao rules realm to meet the requirements, before you can break through. If it is so easy to break through to the Legendary Dao Realm, wouldn't the Innate Origin Domain Alliance take out some fourth-order Dao rule items, wouldn't it be able to cultivate a large number of Legendary Dao Realms? But in fact, this is not the case!"

"The blood of legends is very rare, very rare, and very valuable, it is precisely because of the rarity of the blood of legends that the Innate Origin Domain Alliance cannot help a large number of Nine Folds Dao Realm breakthroughs. Longyan Ancient Emperor said.

"Aren't there a lot of legendary-level creatures, I've seen a lot of them in the Lost Domain!" Ye Tian was even more puzzled.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan said with a smile: "Ye Tian, the legendary-level creatures you saw in the Lost Domain are still not really legendary-level creatures, they just have the bloodline of legendary-level creatures, and their strength is comparable to that of the Legendary Dao Realm. The strength of the real legendary-level creatures is incomparably powerful, much stronger than the ordinary Legend-level Dao Realm. The legendary bodies of the Legendary Dao Realm are all imitation of legendary creatures, do you think that the imitation can be more powerful than the legendary creatures? If the Lost Domain is a true legendary creature, there is only one, but it is difficult to kill. "

Ye Tian knew what the Ancient Emperor of Longyan was talking about, the Ancient Giant Bird, the only one in the Lost Domain who could really be regarded as the only legendary-level creature was it.

"I see, the Ancient Giant Bird is the real legendary creature, and nothing else counts. "

Ye Tianming enlightened.
